notes:
### v1.1.5

#### Added
- First-run Set-Up Guide for new users. The guide walks through adding a roster, selecting gold earners, ordering characters, choosing tracking, configuring raid gold/difficulties, checking system options, and returning to the dashboard.
- Header button to restart the Set-Up Guide at any time.
- Guide highlights for Add Roster, gold-earner toggles, drag handles, tracking, rested inputs, raid settings, startup options, and dashboard overview.
- Dashboard Roster View switch with Cards and List modes.
- Calendar event dashboard status for Chaos Gate and Field Boss.

#### Improved
- Compact character list view with raid progress, difficulty labels, gold indicators, item level, and combat power in a denser layout.
- Dashboard stat cards and roster layout scale better across different window sizes.
- Update details modal now supports longer release notes with scrollable content.
- Combined Start with LOA Logs now attempts to launch LOA Logs when configured and monitors it so LOA Tracker can be shown when LOA Logs starts.
- Lost Ark monitoring now reveals the existing LOA Tracker window instead of spawning a new app instance.
- Startup registration now supports background monitor mode for Lost Ark and LOA Logs companion behavior.

#### Changed
- Updated app metadata and release references to v1.1.5.
- Refreshed known bugs list and removed resolved critical entries for raid completion tracking and raid difficulty saving.

## Installation
Download `loatracker_1.1.5_x64-setup.exe` below.
